name: Soft Whole Wheat Pretzels
recipeIngredient: 2 (16 oz) loaves frozen whole-wheat bread dough, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the bread in the refrigerator overnight.
2. From each loaf, shape 12 balls, each about 1-1/2 inches in diameter.
3. Roll each ball into a rope approximately 14 inches long.
4. Shape the pretzels by forming a knot and looping the ends through.
5. Arrange the pretzels one inch apart on a well-greased baking sheet.
6. Let stand for 20 minutes.
7. Brush the combined egg white and water on each pretzel, then sprinkle with coarse salt.
8. Place the pretzels in a shallow pan containing one inch of boiling water on a lower rack in the oven.
9. Bake the pretzels at 350°F for 20 minutes or until golden brown. Makes two dozen pretzels.
Variation 1: Pretzel Sticks can be made by beginning with balls rolled into 8-inch sticks. Try pretzel letters, which is something small children will enjoy helping you do.
Variation 2: Roll the sticks 4-6 inches long in a mixture of melted butter, cinnamon, and sugar before baking.
